docket_entries.description: SC-221 RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF VITKOFF, ELAN

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00);REMARKS:THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND.NO UNIT NUMBER PROVIDED.THERE ARE THREE(3) UNITS AT THIS ADDRESS.DEFENDANT'S NAME NOT ON ANY OF THE MAILBOXES. NOT ENOUGH INFORMATION TO SERVE DOCUMENTS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF VITKOFF, ELAN AS TO DEFENDANT ARCINIEGAS, ALMA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2014 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER (SC-222) ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS [X] THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS A. [X] PAYMENTS OF $100.00 ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING JUNE 15TH, 2014. UNTIL AUGUST 15TH, 2015 AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT $356.76 D.[X]THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS THE SAME AS THE JUDGMENT. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME. NO INTEREST WILL BE OWED ON THE JUDGMENT, AND THE JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FULL.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF VITKOFF, ELAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-21-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED MAR-03-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARCINIEGAS, ALMA
SC-220 REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ARCINIEGAS, ALMA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,536.76 FILED BY VITKOFF, ELAN AS TO DEFENDANT ARCINIEGAS, ALMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-21-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-21-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VITKOFF, ELAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARCINIEGAS, ALMA $1,636.76 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,756.76 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
